title: Add price validation across validator + service
prompt:
src/validator.ts validates Order objects but does NOT check pricePerUnit. The product team has decided that orders with a non-positive price (zero or negative) are invalid.

The types.ts file already declares an INVALID_PRICE variant on ValidationError. Two changes are required:
  1. validator.ts must emit INVALID_PRICE when pricePerUnit <= 0
  2. service.ts has a hardcoded REASON_MAP that does not include INVALID_PRICE — createOrder will return reason="UNKNOWN" for this new error variant unless the map is updated

The failing tests in tests/target.test.ts check both the validator's output and createOrder's reason field. tests/regression.test.ts (MISSING_SKU, INVALID_QTY, happy-path total, existing reason mapping) must continue to pass.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add new files.
